title: phyllanthus hirsutus
intro: Phyllanthus hirsutus, also known as Phyllanthus hirsutus or Makabuhay, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including the reduction of fever, treatment of diabetes, and protection against liver damage. Phyllanthus hirsutus is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
